_description: Example training configuration for `bot.ml.cli train`. This file documents the TrainConfig schema (bot.ml.schemas.TrainConfig) and is verified by the G9_ExampleConfigsParse test. The `dataset_id` would normally be the dataset_hash_sha256 of a previously-built dataset; the placeholder below is illustrative. NOTE: the train subcommand is STUBBED as of M18.A.9 — see bot/ml/cli.py for the gap (no AssemblerResult persistence to load from). This example documents the user-facing config shape that will be consumed when train lands in M18.A.10+.
